testcases.input: arr = [[[6]],[1,3],[]] Output: [6,1,3] Explanation: const generator = inorderTraversal(arr); generator.next().value; // 6 generator.next().value; // 1 generator.next().value; // 3 generator.next().done; // true
testcases.expectedOutput: [6,1,3] Explanation: const generator = inorderTraversal(arr); generator.next().value; // 6 generator.next().value; // 1 generator.next().value; // 3 generator.next().done; // true

testcases.input: arr = [] Output: [] Explanation: There are no integers so the generator doesn't yield anything.
testcases.expectedOutput: [] Explanation: There are no integers so the generator doesn't yield anything.
